hero.title: Packers & Movers in Nagaland
hero.subtitle: Kohima to Dimapur, Wokha to Zunheboto — 743+ verified movers across Nagaland.

intro:
Nagaland's hilly terrain, rich tribal culture and the commercial hub at Dimapur make it a unique relocation market in Northeast India. Radhe packers and movers connects you with 743+ verified movers across Kohima, Dimapur, Wokha and Zunheboto.

From Kohima's state capital government housing to Dimapur's railway-connected commercial district, our KYC-verified vendors understand Nagaland's road conditions, hill-drive requirements and inter-state move logistics via Assam.
whyUs: Nagaland's limited road capacity on hill routes and the Northeast's long-distance logistics to rest of India require experienced vendors with proper vehicle fitment. Our vendors carry ₹5 lakh damage coverage and GPS tracking on all moves within and beyond Nagaland.

faqs.q: How much do packers and movers cost in Nagaland?
faqs.a: Local moves within Nagaland cities start at ₹5,000. Kohima to Dimapur moves (74 km) typically cost ₹6,000–₹10,000. Inter-state moves to Guwahati or beyond cost ₹12,000+.

faqs.q: Which cities in Nagaland does Radhe packers and movers cover?
faqs.a: We cover 4 cities: Kohima, Dimapur, Wokha and Zunheboto.

faqs.q: Can you handle inter-state moves from Nagaland to mainland India?
faqs.a: Yes. We coordinate long-haul moves from Dimapur via Guwahati to all major Indian cities, with transit insurance and tracking throughout the journey.

faqs.q: Do you work around Nagaland's inner-line permit zones?
faqs.a: Yes. Our vendors are experienced with inner-line permit requirements and coordinate documentation in advance for moves in restricted areas of Nagaland.
